hooks.command: printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(echo -n done | base64) && terminal-notifier -title '✅ Claude Done' -message "Task completed in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD" -sound default -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' claude_status $(echo -n waiting | base64) && terminal-notifier -title '🔔 Claude Waiting' -message "Needs input in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:input" -sound Basso -execute "/opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm
